title: The Frozen World
description: The "the frozen world" mod is a dimension mod that takes the player to a new world.
body:
!!!Early Alpha!!!

Pleas install
[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/RBA7lJaW)

The Frozen World is a Mod I wrote with the program MCreatore. It adds a New Dimension to the game: The Frozen world.

The Currently adds 6 Biomes:
-   Frozen Forest,
-   Frozen Jungle,
-   Frozen Plains,
-   Ice Coast,
-   Ice Ocean,
Permafrost Mountains

How to get Here? 

First you have to find a "Pillager Underpost", which generates in the biomes:
- 	Plains 
- 	Snowy Plains 
- 	Snowy Taiga 
- 	Old growth pine Taiga 

After that, you have to craft the "Frozenword Portal Igniter". You can use this to open the portal.

Survival guide:

In the dimension you will be greened with a bar at the top left of the screen, This shows how warm you are at the moment. The bar will drop off quickly and you will feel the effects shortly after. To get warmer, you have to take two sticks and hit them together.

please note: more features will be added in the future.

We are currently Working on Porting the Mod to Fabric.

If You are Interested in the mod you can join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/GTnRYQadFf)
